data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm that some providers work across multiple locations, as stated in the use case needs. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the specific working arrangements of providers across different locations. The absence of this information indicates a clear gap in the evidence related to the requirement being tested.
gaps: No evidence confirming that some providers work across multiple locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
